channel.title: Vaadin on Pi4J
channel.description: Recent content in Vaadin on Pi4J

item.title: 2026 Smoking Food with Pi4J
item.description:
Let’s smoke some food with Pi4J, Vaadin, and Quarkus

20260319 - Live Stream

Live stream with Matti Tahvonen and Frank Delporte with the smell of smoked food and fresh Java code! Matti from the Vaadin team shows a project that started as a Raspberry Pi side project and turned into a full-blown IoT application. He has built a smoker controller — yes, an actual BBQ smoker — with Pi4J V4, Vaadin for the UI, and Quarkus on the backend. So we can now officially say that Pi4J V4 has been smoke-tested in production…

item.title: 2025 Live Coding: Vaadin
item.description:
Live Stream Coding

Improving the Vaadin+Spring+Pi4J demo application with Matti Tahvonen

2025-09-24, by Frank Delporte

During a live stream coding session, Matti Tahvonen and Frank Delporte updated an existing Vaadin+Spring+Pi4J demo application to use the latest version of the libraries and Java 25. It’s a demo application created a few years ago to be used during presentations at conferences. Of course, everything evolves, so a big update and refactoring was needed.

(Sorry for the hiccups in the first minutes, the network connection dropped a few times…)
